sql_array: CREATE TABLE ldap_entries (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, dn VARCHAR(255), attributes VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO ldap_entries (dn, attributes) VALUES ('cn=John Atanasov,mail=hellraisor@hotmail.com,c=US,o=hotmail.com', 'sample attributes');
UPDATE ldap_entries SET attributes = 'updated sample attributes' WHERE dn = 'cn=John Atanasov,mail=hellraisor@hotmail.com,c=US,o=hotmail.com';
